title: Pearfection
description: Ancient pears from a pearier time.
body:
This mod adds pears into the game.

 

## Blocks
- Lampears: A placeable fruit that can also be eaten, having a chance to give the glowing effect, they can be obtained from growing huge pears or bonemealing flowing callery leaves.
- Copper Lampears: Can be crafted using copper, lampears and honeycomb. They give glowing, haste and luck when eaten.
- Callery twig: A sapling that grows into Callery Sprouts, gained through the mystical beasts known as Sniffers.
- Callery Sprout: A decoration plant, and the inbetween stage for the twigs and the vine.
- Callery Vine: A two block tall plant that can be bonemealed to grow into a huge pear.
- Lampear Block: The base block for the huge pears
- Callery woodset: A woodset that can be obtained from the huge pear's stems.

 

## Items
- Pear Tart: A tart made from lampears which also has a chance to grant the glowing effect.

 

## Features
- Huge Pear: A tree like feature that can be grown from bonemealing callery vines.
- Enormous Pear: A giant version of the huge pear that can be grown by bonemealing callery vines on top of moss.



This mod relies on the terraform api (Prior to 1.21.4) and snifferiety (until 23w17a) to work properly, however both mods are built in so you will not need to install them separately.
